cot_prefix: Okay, let's look at the question and the passage again. The question is asking which of the following descriptions about Yves Gomes is true. The options are A, B, C, and D. First, let's recall what the passage said about Yves Gomes. He's an illegal immigrant in the US, now a university student in Maryland. He left India at 14 months old with his parents, who were deported more than a year ago. He wants to continue his education, go to medical school, and doesn't want to be deported to India, a country he doesn't really know. He supports the DREAMAct and hopes it will pass so he can stay and contribute. Now, let's evaluate each option.
